response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with clear exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest equivalents — aligning well with the role. His deep engineering background, open-source contributions, and process-oriented mindset (TDD, CI/CD) are major assets. However, his lack of explicit Nest.js or Kotlin/Java production experience and limited mention of PostgreSQL/MySQL or Kubernetes in current roles are moderate gaps.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker)
Strong experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Demonstrated commitment to testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship via open-source projects and workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though Java/DLang experience exists
Relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) are listed in skills but not highlighted in key projects
German language proficiency is basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise environment
